title: Technodono's Universal Resourcepack
description:
A resource-pack that may be required for my datapacks to run!
Used alongside shelf storage!
body:
**Downloaded my data-packs? EQUIP THIS!**

this resource-pack provides all of the textures and models for all of my currently supported datapacks!
this includes any items from the shelf storage data-pack series, all relics from for relics & ruins & enables the All new **Datapack MENU GUI**﻿ which should make it super easy to check out the installed data-packs and their settings!

Once installed you can leave this resource-pack running since it does not change any vanilla textures!
Makes using this easy huh!


**Notice:** All of my packs that don't require a resource-pack to run will still be able to run however the In-Game GUI will be disabled! It can be re-enabled by downloading this resource-pack and running /reload
